title: andruris khasiana
intro: Andruris khasiana is a plant species found in the Himalayas, commonly known as Himalayan Sweetroot or Khasian Sweet Root. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Andruris khasiana include the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or dried and used in powder form for medicinal purposes.
